{
  "verdict": "reject",
  "preserved": [
    "Backend mechanics (list and artifact routes)",
    "Dark monitor UI base"
  ],
  "regressions": [
    "Top filter buttons: two do not fire events",
    "Button colors muted, appearing disabled instead of readable/inactive",
    "Font stack changed from accepted prototype",
    "Added extra gradient cards not in accepted design"
  ],
  "required_fixes": [
    "Restore event listeners for all top filter buttons",
    "Adjust inactive button styles to ensure readability without looking disabled",
    "Revert font stack to match selected prototype",
    "Remove unauthorized gradient cards"
  ],
  "tests_to_run": [
    "Verify click events fire on all top filter buttons",
    "Check contrast ratios for active and inactive buttons against WCAG standards",
    "Validate font-family CSS matches prototype specification",
    "Ensure no extra UI components (gradient cards) are rendered"
  ]
}
